‚óè Edit ComponentSetWidget.jsx +2
  ‚îî packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/ComponentSetWidget.jsx

‚óè Now commit and push:

‚óè Commit and push fix (shell)
  ‚îÇ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget && git
  ‚îÇ add packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/widgetIcons.jsx
  ‚îÇ packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/ComponentSetWidget.jsx && git commit -m "fix:
  ‚îÇ register mirror icon for ComponentSet flip-layout action‚Ä¶
  ‚îî 16 lines...

‚óè Fixed and pushed (b344b662).

  The "mirror" icon wasn't registered in ICON_REGISTRY, so the flip-layout button was
  rendering the text "flip-layout" inside a 24√ó24px circle ‚Äî effectively invisible.

  Two changes:

   1. widgetIcons.jsx ‚Äî added MirrorIcon from @primer/octicons-react and registered it
  as 'mirror'
   2. ComponentSetWidget.jsx ‚Äî added return true from handleAction for consistency

  The button should now show the mirror icon and work on click. HMR should pick this up
  live.

 ~/workspace/st... [‚éá 4.3.0--prompt-widget*%]
